questionHtml: The human brain is larger than the brain of many animals. Identify one other difference between the human brain and the brain of a sheep.
markschemeHtml:
a. larger cerebral cortex in human brain ✔ Do not accept larger brain for human as it is in the stem.

b. higher folding in human brain
OR
increased surface area in human brain ✔

c. angle of spinal cord more vertical in human
OR
angle of spinal cord more horizontal in sheep ✔

meta.title: The human brain is larger than the brain of many animals. Identify one other difference between the human brain and the brain of a sheep.
